name: Image of God
oracleText:
Humans you control get +1/+1.
Whenever one or more Humans enter the battlefield under your control, you gain 1 life and scry 1. This ability triggers only once each turn.
flavorText: "So God created man in his own image." — Genesis 1:27
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme reuses the Michelangelo-derived creation artwork already present in Early World for the Image of God treatment.
